sections.heading: Track my order
sections.content: Sign into your account below. Here you can easily track your orders, start a return and see your order history.

sections.heading: Track without an account
sections.content: If you don't have an account with us, add your order number and email below. You'll then be able to track your recent order or start a return.

sections.heading: Order number
sections.content: This is a 13-digit number, found in your confirmation email or on your receipt. It starts with CUR. If you bought your item in-store, your order number is on your receipt, and begins with 74.

sections.heading: Email address
sections.content: The email address used to place your order.

faqs.question: What is the order number format?
faqs.answer: It is a 13-digit number starting with CUR for online orders or 74 for in-store purchases.
